description: Dalian's traditional commercial center, featuring numerous shopping malls, restaurants, and metro transportation.
Golden Pebble Beach's core seaside bathing area, known for its fine sand and clear seawater, ideal for coastal leisure.
A national first-class museum housing nearly 200,000 specimens, with extensive exhibits of marine life and dinosaur fossils.
The historical core area of Dalian, surrounded by century-old European-style buildings that showcase the city's historical evolution.
A seaside park with a bathing beach, suitable for family outings and coastal relaxation.
The world's first museum themed around the mysteries of life, showcasing plastinated biological specimens.
A landmark square in the center of Dalian, featuring a crystal ball monument and a bustling commercial area.
Dalian's modern business district, equipped with musical fountains and a seaside promenade.
A wooden boardwalk built along the coastline, offering close-up views of the sea and waves, perfect for strolling and sightseeing.
A distinctive street district preserving a complete cluster of Russian-style buildings, offering an exotic cultural experience.
A panoramic viewpoint of Dalian city, providing a bird's-eye view of the urban area and coastline.
A seaside park renowned for its unique black rock formations, featuring distinctive geological landscapes.
A modern museum showcasing Dalian's urban development and industrial civilization.
A historical and cultural district with well-preserved modern architecture and a strong artistic atmosphere.
